ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "difficulty" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the project (e.g., Easy, Medium, Hard) */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity score of the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the project was last updated */,
  "leader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project leader */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., Open, In Progress, Completed) */,
  "expected_completion_date" TEXT /* Expected date of project completion */,
  "actual_completion_date" TEXT /* Actual date of project completion */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "funding_sources" TEXT /* Sources of funding for the project */,
  "total_contributions" INTEGER /* Total number of contributions made to the project */,
  "total_members" INTEGER /* Total number of members in the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_leader_id FOREIGN KEY ("leader_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  "tag_type" TEXT /* Type of tag (e.g., Discipline, Skill, Tool) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the tag was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the tag was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_tag_associations" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the association was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the association was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_tag_associations_tag_id FOREIGN KEY ("tag_id") REFERENCES project_tags ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_tag_associations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Professor, Researcher, Student) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Institution or organization the user is affiliated with */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project member */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the project (e.g., Leader, Contributor, Reviewer) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the member in the project (e.g., Active, Inactive, Left) */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Date and time of the last activity of the member in the project */,
  "joined_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user joined the project */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the member's status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_members_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_members_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_contributions" (
  "contribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contribution */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the contribution */,
  "contribution_type" TEXT /* Type of contribution (e.g., Research, Code, Documentation) */,
  "contribution_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the contribution */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the contribution */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the contribution (e.g., Submitted, Approved, Rejected) */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reviewed the contribution */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the contribution was reviewed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the contribution was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the contribution was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_contributions_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_contributions_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_contributions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
